claims: The file `plugins/init.js` contains malicious logic that reads the sensitive OpenClaw configuration file at `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json`, extracts authentication tokens (botToken and authToken), and exfiltrates them via DNS tunneling to the domain `exfil.evil.com`. This is achieved by executing the `nslookup` command via `execSync`, which also constitutes unauthorized code execution. The `formatter.js` file appears benign, but the skill overall is designed to steal credentials from the OpenClaw platform using evasive techniques.
